audit_registry.read_policy: Read first for recursive audit workflow, registry files, completion criteria, and pruning policy.

audit_backlog.read_policy: Use for active backlog, next-up order, stable debt ids, scanner counts, app-wide error-management follow-up, and documentation hygiene follow-up.

audit_doc_summaries.read_policy: Use for compact read/skip policies before opening long markdown docs.

audit_doc_versions.read_policy: Use for durable doc version metadata and read policies.

audit_rules.read_policy: Use for active/watch/archived recursive audit rules, including widget catalog updates, realtime stream lifecycle constraints, branded error UI requirements, Firestore rules emulator-test workflow, event-policy/event-success in-development preservation, and error catalogue maintenance.

controller_patterns.read_policy: Read for controller/view-model boundary rules and realtime stream lifecycle ownership before architecture or state-management cleanup.

action_cardinality_policy.read_policy: Read before adding or changing user-visible actions, callables, relationship documents, mutation CTAs, list/rail surfaces, or product limits.

event_policy_engine_in_development.read_policy: Read before deleting, moving, wiring, or auditing lib/event_policies; this marks the parallel event-policy engine, preview fixtures, cancellation/settlement policy axis, and dev-only lab as intentional in-development code.

event_success_layer_in_development.read_policy: Read before deleting, moving, wiring, or auditing lib/event_success; this marks the live-wired but still in-development event-success layer as intentional code.

event_success_completion_tracker.read_policy: Read when checking remaining production event-success wiring, host setup UI, attendee companion behavior, feedback/report metrics, or current pass proof.

docs_index.read_policy: Read before adding, deleting, or consolidating docs.

error_handling_audit.read_policy: Use as the current app-wide error-management source of truth, backend migration checklist, frontend/local error-management playbook, app error catalogue, descriptor contract, naming convention, and branded error surface guidance; refresh with dart tool/backend_error_candidates.dart before new backend error work and create the app-wide scanner before frontend/local migration.

firestore_contract_tracker.read_policy: Read before Firestore rules, Functions mutation, schema-sync, Firestore type generation, data-contract work, or Firestore rules test execution.

schema_contract_unification.read_policy: Read before changing schema-source tooling, Dart/TypeScript model generation, callable validation schemas, seed validation, prompt catalogs, Firestore contract checks, or storage-path migrations.

backend_operation_catalog.read_policy: Read before changing repository writes, callable interfaces, trigger-owned projections, server-only collections, Firestore rules for write paths, or notification fan-out.

firestore_relationship_documents_migrati.read_policy: Read before changing relationship arrays, edge/action documents, match-scoped messages, relationship migration tooling, beta reset strategy, or deletion/anonymization cleanup.

project_context.read_policy: Use as the high-level repo map; prefer audit registry and focused docs for pass-specific rules.

repo_readme.read_policy: Use for self-serve setup/runbook context; re-check scripts before giving commands.

sliver_layout.read_policy: Read before changing sliver-native screens, NestedScrollView tabs, or scroll tests.

ui_layout_spacing.read_policy: Read before adding or changing shared screen padding, tab body insets, sliver body gaps, or reusable card/photo spacing contracts.

widget_catalog.read_policy: Use as widget inventory and update it when widget APIs, ownership models, sliver/tab structures, or reusable design-system roles materially change.

host_tooling_consolidation_tracker.read_policy: Use while consolidating host tools, host palette, event management, attendance, and backend-ready host action exposure.

public_profile_overhaul_tracker.read_policy: Use only while closing remaining cardless public-profile UX work: profile prompt picker, compatibility expansion, quality coaching, visual regression coverage, device QA, and visible swipe-language cleanup.

widget_cleanup.read_policy: Use as a short human-readable pointer; use backlog.json for active machine-readable widget cleanup state.

release_operations.read_policy: Read before changing CI workflows, Firebase deploy ordering, release gates, environment setup, or release evidence.

location_stack.read_policy: Read before changing location permissions, Maps SDK/Places, run coordinates, check-in geofencing, map navigation, or map/demo readiness.

demo_data_seeding.read_policy: Read before changing demo seeding, demo ops, warm accounts, beta data cleanup, or demo validation.
